local_moving.title: Local Moving
local_moving.subtitle: Movers in Florida
local_moving.description: Expert local moves within Melbourne, Titusville, Rockledge, and all surrounding Brevard County cities. Hourly rates, same-day availability, full equipment provided.
local_moving.image_alt: Professional movers carrying furniture into a Florida home

long_distance_moving.title: Long Distance Moving
long_distance_moving.subtitle: Florida & Beyond
long_distance_moving.description: Longer-distance moving support can be discussed through the quote form. Share pickup and delivery details so the team can confirm availability and next steps.
long_distance_moving.image_alt: Long distance moving truck prepared for transport

moving_service.title: Residential Moving
moving_service.subtitle: Home Movers
moving_service.description: We offer residential moving services for homes of all sizes.
moving_service.image_alt: Residential moving service for a home move

commercial_moving.title: Commercial Moving
commercial_moving.subtitle: Office & Business
commercial_moving.description: Office and business relocations planned for zero downtime. We work around your schedule, with evenings and weekends available across Brevard County.
commercial_moving.image_alt: Commercial moving team relocating office equipment

packing_service.title: Packing Services
packing_service.subtitle: Full-Service Packing
packing_service.description: Our professional packing team ensures your belongings are securely packed.
packing_service.image_alt: Professional packing supplies and moving boxes

specialty_moves.title: Specialty Moves
specialty_moves.subtitle: Pianos, Hot Tubs & More
specialty_moves.description: Piano moves, hot tub moves, spa moves, and oversized items handled by trained specialists with the proper equipment.
